CustomField.description: 3rd level division of Geographical information. Based on the provenworks objects Countries, State and Zip/postal code Depending on the alignments within each of the business areas the Sub-Region is set on their needs. Set up is designed to ensure all fields are filled in on the account record to ensure accurate reporting. Some information may be redundant, however it accommodates reporting for the entire account base.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Identifies the Sales level breakdown and third and lowest level account geographic segmentation within the specific Geo.
CustomField.label: Sub-Region
